seoTitle: Tunnel vs Turners Beach — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tunnel and Turners Beach. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tunnel vs Turners Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tunnel and Turners Beach.
heading: Tunnel vs Turners Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tunnel, Tasmania and Turners Beach, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Turners Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Tunnel (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tunnel or Turners Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tunnel has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Turners Beach scores 32/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tunnel scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Turners Beach scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tunnel or Turners Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Turners Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
